title: Nginx Client Max Body Size Example
summary: Increase the allowed request body size in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample upstream with a real upload handler before validation.
Adjust the size limit for the target upload path before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official client_max_body_size directive syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and real upload requests on a staging host before use.
